provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly environment concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi environment, visible material texture and industrial detail, visible brushstrokes, wide establishing view, no characters present, Compact-administered landing pad on a dusty colony world, concrete pad with painted guide lines and landing markers faded by weather, control tower of pressed steel construction in background, fuel umbilical stations, wind sock, chain link perimeter fence with regulation signage, everything covered in fine dust, the bus stop of space travel
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, tourist vista, beautiful landscape, scenic, sunset, people, characters, text, watermark, blurry, low quality

judgment.explanation: Planetary/environmental scene with functional gritty atmosphere, faction presence or universal frontier quality.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
